name: testWaitForScopeFitDataFr
title: testWaitForScopeFitDataFr
syntax: long testWaitForScopeFitDataFr(frFrame aMessage, dword msgFieldStart, dword msgFieldEnd); // form 1
long testWaitForScopeFitDataFr(frFrame aMessage, dword msgFieldStart, dword msgFieldEnd, dword preTimeNs, dword postTimeNs); // form 2
description: The defined frame cutout is shown in the scope's Diagram view. The enlarged area is automatically scaled in time direction.

parameters.name: msgFieldStart, msgFieldEnd
parameters.description: The start and end of the cutout to be fitted. See ScopeBitAnalyse.cin

parameters.name: preTimeNs
parameters.description: Defines the preliminary lead time in [ns] for the defined message field start.

parameters.name: postTimeNs
parameters.description: Defines the overtravel time in [ns] for the defined message field end.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
